title: erysimum ochroleucum subsp. duriaei
intro: Erysimum ochroleucum subsp. duriaei, also known as Duria's wallflower, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Erysimum ochroleucum subsp. duriaei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
